OneLineDescription: Statically distributes supported SPID rules directly to winning NPC records.
LongDescription: Reads selected *_DISTR.ini files from the Data root and optional SPIDThesisConverted folder, then applies direct-record Keyword, Faction, Perk, Spell, Shout, Package, SleepOutfit, Outfit, Item, and Skin distributions through Synthesis. Includes missing bare-EditorID keyword creation, package and package-list handling, fresh per-run normal chance and item-count rolls, first-match outfit/sleep-outfit/skin assignment, ordered keyword chaining, optional INI filename allowlisting, optional post-run INI archiving, and Synthesis 0.36+ master-overflow split output compatibility. NPC templates and inherited data are intentionally ignored.
